dataset_name: Synthetic D7 portable retrieval smoke fixture
success_criteria: The portable smoke comparison should run from repo-local projects_dir without default-store mutation.
The synthetic retrieval baseline should recover the one registered exact D7 anchor.

metric_criteria.rationale: This synthetic smoke fixture aligns the gold span to the retrieved candidate span.
This synthetic smoke fixture should have one exact true-positive and no false positives.

caution: D7 comparison protocol validation is process metadata only; this synthetic smoke artifact is not held-out D7 validity evidence, live-baseline evidence, methodological-validity evidence, superiority evidence, or SOTA evidence.
